name: Sherry Trifle
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the sponge cakes into medium-sized pieces.
2. Spread each piece with jam.
3. Place in a large glass bowl and sprinkle over the raspberries (use frozen or fresh, in-season).
4. Add sherry until the cakes are saturated.
5. Make the custard: Heat half the cream in a small saucepan.
6. Blend the egg yolks, sugar, and cornflour together in a basin.
7. Pour the hot cream over the mixture and stir constantly.
8. Return to the pan and gently reheat until thick.
9. Allow to cool.
10. Slice the bananas and mix with the raspberries.
11. Pour the custard over the fruit.
12. Whip up the remaining cream and spread over the custard.
13. Decorate with flaked almonds.
14. Cover and chill for 3-4 hours before serving.
This is nice served with a good dessert wine, such as one of the Australian or Californian Muscats.
